creator: spawk@acm.poly.edu
text:
Unfortunately, neither method fixes it. The first patch results in the 
following being printed when the device is inserted:

umass0: <Samsung Electronics YP-U3, class 0/0, rev 2.00/2.20, addr 2> on 
uhub4

Nothing else is printed about it until it is detached, which results in 
a lot of these:

umass0: BBB reset failed, IOERROR
umass0: BBB bulk-in clear stall failed, IOERROR
umass0: BBB bulk-out clear stall failed, IOERROR

Backing out the quirk introduced by kern/125398 results in:

umass0: <Samsung Electronics YP-U3, class 0/0, rev 2.00/2.20, addr 2> on 
uhub4
(da0:umass-sim0:0:0:0): got CAM status 0x4
(da0:umass-sim0:0:0:0): fatal error, failed to attach to device
(da0:umass-sim0:0:0:0): lost device
(da0:umass-sim0:0:0:0): removing device entry
